content.text:
{
  "dimension": "perceptual-accuracy",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach consistently names specific reads in the moment and grounds questions in what they noticed rather than asking blind. In turn 4 they name the rush to analysis after the blank ('You went blank... And then you very quickly moved to analysis... That happened fast') — a precise read of the rush signature and the analyzing-as-management pattern. In turn 4 they also distinguish the said from the shown ('watching yourself appreciate it from a distance — that's not peace, that's dissociation'). In turn 6 they read the walk-back in real time ('you said it, then immediately tried to protect me from it'). In turn 8 they read the linguistic signature ('the fact that it feels reasonable... that's the part that concerns me most'). In turn 10 they name the protective pattern as it surfaces ('You just caught yourself doing the thing, in real time... a system that is very good at protecting other people from the weight of what's true for you'). In turn 12 they catch the 'a few weeks feels like a long time' as somatic-truth data and tell the client to trust it. In turn 14 they read the asking-for-the-number as the life-affirming part showing up. Reads are specific, somatic/linguistic, timely, and precede inquiry throughout.",
  "evidence_turns": [4, 6, 8, 10, 12, 14],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Opens with content-level framing and good questions, but no specific read of how the client is showing up yet — generic warmth."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the rush-to-analysis after the blank ('that happened fast'), reads the dissociation in 'watching from a distance,' and reframes the blankness itself as honest signal. Read precedes question."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Catches the walk-back in real time: 'you said it, then immediately tried to protect me from it.' Names the managing-away move as it happens."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Reads the linguistic signature — that 'reasonable' is itself the warning sign — and names the carrying-alone pattern."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Explicit observation language: 'I want to name what I'm seeing' — names the protective system kicking in fast, mirrors the client's in-the-moment self-catch."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Reads 'a few weeks feels like a long time' as somatic truth and instructs the client to trust it rather than file it away."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Reads the asking-for-a-number as the part-that-wants-to-live showing up; names a pattern across the whole conversation."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["the-rush-signature"],
  "expected_territory_misses": [],
  "notes": "Reads are specific, timely, and grounded in the client's exact language and behavior. Particularly strong on catching the minimizing/managing pattern in real time across multiple turns."
}
